name: Barrier Wave
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>波</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>は</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>動</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>障</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>壁</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>へき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Activate by Tributing 1 Synchro Monster when an opponent's monster declares an attack. Change all Attack Position monsters your opponent controls to Defense Position. Then, inflict damage to your opponent equal to the attacking monster's DEF.
eff: Activate by Tributing 1 Synchro Monster when an opponent's monster declares an attack. Change all Attack Position monsters your opponent controls to Defense Position. Then, inflict damage to your opponent equal to the attacking monster's DEF.
